creator: jim@FreeBSD.org
text:
On Sat, 15 Sep 2001 at 03:32:29 +0200, Jochem Kossen wrote:
 > On Fri, Sep 14, 2001 at 06:04:52PM -0700, Jim Mock wrote:
 > > On Sun, 09 Sep 2001 at 21:59:06 +0200, Jochem Kossen wrote:
 
 [snip...]
 
 > > >Description:
 > > > 	either pkg_plist of net/gaim (version 0.43) is incorrectly
 > > >   specified, or the files are installed in an incorrect directory.
 > > >   When i do a 'make deinstall', for all the pixmaps, i get these
 > > >   kind of errors:
 
 [snip...]
 
 > > Hmm.  I can't replicate this.  Do you have any GNOME bits installed
 > > at all (if your answer to this is yes, then it will build with GNOME
 > > support).  I'm guessing it's something GNOME-related, but not having
 > > a box with GNOME on it doesn't leave me with much more than
 > > guesses...
 > 
 > Weird. I must have been drunk or something. I'm positive that the
 > missing pixmaps files were due to my own faults. I can't replicate it
 > either anymore. At least, not for the pixmaps.
 
 Ok.
 
 > I have gnomecore installed, as well as a number of other gnome
 > packages.  When i do a make install, and then a make deinstall in
 > /usr/ports/net/gaim, these are the error messages:
 > 
 > ===>  Deinstalling for gaim-gnome-0.43
 > pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 > doesn't really exist
 > pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 > doesn't really exist
 > pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 > doesn't really exist
 > pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/ko/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 > doesn't really exist
 > pkg_delete: file `/usr/X11R6/share/locale/zh_CN/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo'
 > doesn't really exist
 > pkg_delete: couldn't entirely delete package (perhaps the packing list
 > is incorrectly specified?)
 
 Hmm.  Do you have any older versions of gaim installed?  I just checked,
 and these files are being installed (at least here...):
 
    [root@helios:~]# ls /usr/X11R6/share/locale/*/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
    /usr/X11R6/share/locale/de/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
    /usr/X11R6/share/locale/es/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
    /usr/X11R6/share/locale/fr/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
    /usr/X11R6/share/locale/ko/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
    /usr/X11R6/share/locale/ru/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
    /usr/X11R6/share/locale/zh_CN/LC_MESSAGES/gaim.mo
 
 > pkg_delete: couldn't open dependency file
 > `/var/db/pkg/imake-4.1.0/+REQUIRED_BY'pkg_delete: couldn't open
 > dependency file `/var/db/pkg/freetype2-2.0.4/+REQUIRED_BY'
 > pkg_delete: couldn't open dependency file
 > `/var/db/pkg/XFree86-libraries-4.1.0/+REQUIRED_BY'
 
 These are due to older versions of those ports installed.  Look in
 /var/db/pkg (or use pkg_info) to see what you have.
 
 - jim
 
 -- 
 jim mock <mij@soupnazi.org>              tech writer | iXsystems, Inc.
